sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116003" key="ywmoko/lafos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψωμο-κόλᾰφος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n116003.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who takes cuffs for the sake of morsels of bread, low parasite,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0447.tlg001:49" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
